title: KTU UPDATES
content: The Detailed Time Table of B. Tech S2 (S) Examination January 2026 (2024 scheme) is published

title: New Material Added
content: 2024 Scheme S2 Notes are now fully updated for all branches.

title: KTU UPDATES
content: EXAM SCHEDULED FOR 24/04/2026 HAS BEEN RESCHEDULED TO 14/05/2026.ALL CONCERNED STUDENTS ARE REQUESTED TO TAKE NOTE OF THE ABOVE CHANGE AND PLAN ACCORDINGLY.
